results.rendered_html:
sūtikā A woman recently delivered.
Comp.
— agāraṃ, -gṛhaṃ, -gehaṃ,
— bhavanaṃ the lying-in-chamber.
— rogaḥ
(pb) sickness subsequent to child-birth, puerperal sickness.
— ṣaṣṭhī N. of a particular goddess worshipped on the sixth day after child-birth.
